title: aster securiformis
intro: Aster securiformis, also known as the white pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Aster securiformis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in some commercial herbal remedies.
